titleStmt.title: SII 18.163: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 163. (B.K. No. 104 of 1933-34.) HULLATTI, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab in front of the temple of Kallēs11vara.

summary.p: This inscription, referring itself to the reign of Sōmēśvaradēva, is dated in the 4th year of his reign, Parābhava Mārgaśira, Pūrṇimā, Monday, lunar eclipse. The details are irregular. The tithi given corresponds to A.D. 1186, November 28, Friday. It may be noted however that in the given year, a lunar eclipse occurred in Āśvina, corresponding to September 30. The pūrṇimā of this month commenced on Monday at ·37. This probably is the date intended. The mistake might be due to the engraving of the record at a later date.

It records a grant of land to the god Svayambhu-Kalidēvasvāmi of Hosavūr by Mahāmaṇḍalēs11vara Vikramāditya of the Gutta family, his wife Sōvaladēvi, and Kāḷa-gāvuṇḍa. The genealogy of the Gutta chief as well as of Kāḷa-gāvuṇḍa is given. An allusion to Sōmēśvara's overcoming the Kalachuryas is made in the record (line 13).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namaḥstuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhā
ya śaṁbhavē . jayatyānaṁdasaṁdōhajñānai(yi)śvaryyamayassadā yi
cchāmātrasamutpannasamastabhuvanaśśivaṁ . gaṇapatyāya namaḥ .Read vaḥ.
© varaphēnānīkaśuṁbhadbahaḷatarataraṁgaṁgaḷoṁdoṁdanoṁdaṁ bharadiṁ taḷpoyye mēliṁgogedu
poḷeva sīrmmuttiveṁbante sūsuttiralōraṁturbbi tuṁturppanigaḷasadaḷaṁ celvanāḷda ttu kormmōddhu
rapāṭhīnādi bāsvad guḷuguḷitagaḷadhvānaraudraṁ samudraṁ . varakūrmmēṁdraṁ sukaṁdaṁ phaṇi
pativimaḷōttāḷanāḷaṁ diśāsiṁdhuramudyadgōtrabhūbhṛtkuḷadaḷanicayaṁ kēsaraṁdē śabhāsvatpu
rasaṁdōhaṁ samantunnatadivijanagaṁ karṇnakākāramaṁ tāḷdire jaṁbūdvīpavabjōdbhava janitasarō
jātamintoppitōrkkuṁ . piriduṁ madhyasthamā dvīpadoḷamaranagaṁ tannagēndrakke teṁkalu bharatakṣē
traṁ janānaṁdamanodavipudā kṣētradoḷnāḍeyuṁ sauṁdaralakṣmījanmagēhaṁ nuta bhuvana (.)
vadhūkuṁtaḷaṁ tānenalu vistarisikkuṁ kuṁtaḷōrvvītaḷavakhiḷasudhāḷankritōdyadvi ḷāsaṁ .
Antenisida kuṁtaḷadēśādhipati . Araviṁdasmērasārēkṣaṇabhuvanajanaschāranīrējaṣaṁḍaṁ si
riyaṁtakkaysaludyatkaḷacuridharaṇīpāḷarājyāndhakāraṁpareyalucāḷukyasiṁhāsanakana
dudayādrīṁdradoḷu vīrasōmēśvaradēvaṁ rājyalakṣmīpriyanudaysidaṁ rāya mārttaṇḍadēvaṁ .
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvara parama
bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatu sōmēśvaradēva
ra vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛdhdhipravardhdhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire .
tatpādapadmōpajīviyappa śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaran vikramādityadēvana vamśāvatāra meṁteṁdaḍe .
maledidirāntamaṁḍaḷikaraṁ biḍadaṁḍaledājiraṁgadoḷu caladinaḍurttu geldunijakīrttiya nintu
digēbhadaṁtadoḷu nilisiye vikramāṁkanavanītaḷadoḷu balicārudattaraṁ gelevaralitta ḍa
rtthigadaṭiṁ pratipāḷisalī dharitriyaṁ . kaṁda . siṁgakke kēsaraṁ mātaṁgakke madāṁbu pogevavolo
gedanadātaṁge vibhu jōyidēvanasaṁgatavikhyāta bhūtaḷādhīśvararoḷu . maṁḍaḷikabhai
ravaṁ vibhu gaṁḍaroḷī jōyidēvanendavanīśarggaṁḍaḷidu vastuvāhanabhaṁḍāravanittu tettu
bāḷvarppalaruṁ . Ātana taneyaṁ bhuvanakhyātaṁ śrīvikramāṁkanatyadhikabaḷōpētaṁ hē
ḷāsādhyade bhūtaḷasāmnājyalakṣmiyaṁ taḷedirddaṁ . manucaritaṁ caritradeḍeyoMistake for mrā.
ḷu subhaṭaṁ bhaṭayuddaraṁgadoḷu dinakaranaṁdanaṁ dayeyinīveḍeyoḷu vibhu vikramāṁ
kaneṁdanavarataṁ janaṁ padedu baṇnisalī vasudhādhipāḷaroḷu banavasedēśadoḷnegaḷdamaṁ
ḍaḷikarkkaḷa gaṁḍabhairavaṁ . toṭṭiloḷe paṭṭavaṁ taḷedoṭṭajiyiṁ hoysaṇēśa pāṁḍyana
balamaṁ kaṭṭāḷtanadiṁdaṁjisi jeṭṭigavesaresedudaṁdu vikramanripana(ṁ) . va . tadvallabhe .
sati guṇavati dānānvite patihite śrīvijayapāṁḍyavaṁśōdbhave bhūpativikramana ma
nōvallabhe sati sōvaladēvigaḷida peṁḍirddoreyē . śrīmaccaturtthavaṁśavyōmā
mṛtakiraṇanenipa bammagavuṁḍaṁ śrī (.) mannāḷprabhuvenisi manōmudadiṁdoldu sukhadinippa
nnevaraṁ . Ātana piriyamaga . jakkaṁ prabhugaḷoḷītane takkaṁ kularūpaguṇadinaiśva
ryyadoḷaṁ mikkanene peṁpuvettaṁ dikkarigaḷaneyda nimirda jasadiṁ dhareyoḷu . Antā
vibhuvina kulavadhu kāntājanaratnamenisi sītege migileṁbantodavida patibhaktiyanāṁ
tesedaḷu mākigauḍivesariṁ jagadoḷu . Avarirvvara sasnēhada kavalogevaṁtogedaralli
kāḷagavuṁḍaṁ yuvaraṁ nāraṇa bammaṁ savinītaṁ cīlanenipa taneyarnnālvaru . śivāya namaḥ
svasti śrīmaccāḷukyacakravartti sōmēśvaradēvavarṣada nālke 4 neya parābhava
saṁvatsarada mārggaśira suddha paurṇnami sōmuvāramuṁ sōmagrahaṇaṁ saṁ
krāntiyuṁ vyatīpātamuṁ kūḍibaralu hulleyaṁhosavūra śrī
svayaṁbhukalidēvasvāmige khaṁḍasphuṭitajīrṇnōdhdhāra nivēdyakkaṁ śrīmanmahā
maṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ vikramādityadēvanuṁ sōvaladēviyaruṁ kāḷagāvuṇḍanu biṭṭa bhūmi
hiriya keṟeya keḷage tōṭa kammahattu 10 gardde kammavippattu 20 Ūriṁ paḍuvalu
kajjaliya dāriyiṁ teṁka Eremattaru nālku 4 yiṁtinitumaṁ śīlaguṇasampannara
ppa Īśvarapaṁḍitargge dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍikoṭṭaru . stadattaṁparadattaṁ vā yō harē
ti vasundharā ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasahasrāṇāmeṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . kōṭi payaṁkavile
yanekkōṭi tapōdhanara vēdavidaraṁ pamṁnirkkōṭiyane kōṭitīrtthadi kōṭi mahādina
doḷaḷida niṁntidanaḷidōṁ . na viśaṁ viśamityāhu dēvaśvaṁ viśamucyatē viśamēkākinaṁ hanti dē
viśvaṁ putrapautrikaṁ . svasti śrīlaguṇasaṁpa(ṁ)nnarappa Ulihaḷḷiya kalidēvapaṁ
ḍita kavite . sāyiraguḍiyā kētōjana khaṁḍaraṇe . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ © ©
Digital edition of SII 18.163 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
